parameters.jsCode: return $input.all().map(it => ({ json: { ...it.json, __branch: 'created' } }));
return $input.all().map(it => ({ json: { ...it.json, __branch: 'duplicate' } }));
return $input.all().map(it => ({ json: { ...it.json, __branch: 'error' } }));

parameters.text: ={{ $json.dlq_dm_text || ':rotating_light: Vault commit error. Thread root: ' + ($json.thread_ts || 'unknown') + '. See the digest channel.' }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  zoom_meeting_uuid:      $json.zoom_meeting_uuid || null,
  topic:                  $json.topic || "",
  start_time:             $json.start_time || "",
  duration_min:           $json.duration_min || null,
  participants_lastnames: $json.participants_lastnames || [],
  classification:         $json.classification || null,
  action_items:           $json.action_items || [],
  transcript_excerpts:    ($json.vtt_text || $json.vtt_content || "").slice(0, 40000),
  slack_root_ts:          $json.slack_root_ts || $json.prior_slack_root_ts || (() => { try { return $('Capture root ts').first().json.slack_root_ts || null } catch (e) { return null } })() || null,
  slack_channel_id:       $json.slack_root_channel || $json.slack_channel_id || $json.prior_slack_channel || (() => { try { return $('Capture root ts').first().json.slack_root_channel || null } catch (e) { return null } })() || "__BACKBRIEF_DIGEST_CHANNEL_ID__",
  vault_url:              $json.vault_url || $json.github_url || null
}) }}
